name: Mexican Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 garlic cloves, minced (or 1/4 tsp Garlic powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Allow the mixture to stand for 3 hours at room temperature.
4. This salsa is excellent with tacos or as a dip for tortilla chips.
